# BP-81 negative: one captured time value is reused throughout the condition.
lang: go
file: BP-81-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "time"

func expired(deadline time.Time) bool {
	now := time.Now()
	if now.After(deadline) && now.Before(deadline.Add(time.Minute)) {
		return true
	}
	return false
}
